response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects senior/lead roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and team integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is a hard requirement
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, misaligned with entry-level role
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in professional projects
